# Local Launch — Websites & SEO for the Trades

## About
Local Launch builds custom websites and runs SEO for plumbing, mechanical, landscaping, electrical, roofing, HVAC, and trade businesses in Greenville, SC and Upstate South Carolina.

## Core pages
- Homepage: https://local-launch-site.vercel.app/
- Pricing / Packages: https://local-launch-site.vercel.app/#pricing
- FAQ: https://local-launch-site.vercel.app/#faq
- Case Study (Redwood Landscaping): https://local-launch-site.vercel.app/#proof

## Services
- Custom trade business websites
- SEO + local search optimization
- AI receptionist / 24/7 call answering
- AI Yard Visualizer (landscapers)
- Google Business Profile optimization
- Directory management (Yelp, BBB, Nextdoor, Apple, Bing)

## Contact
- Email: zsch21425@gmail.com
- Based in Greenville, SC
- No contracts — one-time builds from $300
